orphan_rate_derived.note: Extrapolated: (521 × 0.818 + 902 × 0.970) / 1423. Philippe et al. 2013 reported 92.5% by independent method.

spearman_tier_pvalue.note: Both GC and gene length show rho=-1.0 across 5 tiers. Fisher combined p <<< 0.001.

hypothetical_spatial_or_ci.note: n=9 total hypothetical non-self hits. Wide CI reflects small n. Lower bound 2.32 > 1.0 indicates enrichment even at conservative estimate.

neutrality_regression.interpretation: Slope 0.1176 << 1.0 (expected under strict neutrality). GC12 largely invariant with wobble GC3, consistent with translational selection.

cai_mannwhitney.note: p essentially 0 (machine precision limit). CAI reference: A. castellanii Kazusa database.
